http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_497.definition: Sequesters actin monomers, preventing actin filament assembly required for macropinocytosis. chemical (marine toxin), dose:0.1-5 microM

http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_522.name: Wortmannin
http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_522.definition: Blocks PI3K signaling, which is essential for closure of macropinocytic cups. chemical (PI3K inhibitor), dose:10-100 nM

http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_653.name: LY294002
http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_653.definition: Another PI3K inhibitor that reduces PIP3 signaling and prevents macropinosome closure. chemical (PI3K inhibitor), dose:10-50 microM

http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_889.name: Rottlerin
http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_889.definition: Reported to block macropinocytosis through PKC-dependent actin remodeling. chemical (PKC delta inhibitor, plant-derived), dose:1-10 microM

http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_474.name: Imipramine
http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_474.definition: Drug (tricyclic antidepressant), dose:IC50 almost equal to 131 nM

http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_807.name: Phenoxybenzamine
http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_807.definition: Drug (alpha-adrenergic antagonist), dose:IC50 almost equal to 44 nM

http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_273.name: Vinblastine
http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_273.definition: Drug (microtubule formation inhibitor; anticancer agent), dose:IC50 almost equal to 2.2 pM

http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_292.name: Auranofin
http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_292.definition: Drug (anti-rheumatoid arthritis agent), dose:IC50 almost equal to 733 nM

http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_607.name: Itraconazole
http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_607.definition: Drug (antifungal medicine), dose:IC50 almost equal to 106 nM

http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_770.name: Flubendazole
http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_770.definition: Drug (anthelmintic), dose:IC50 almost equal to 240 nM

http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_945.name: Terfenadine
http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_945.definition: Drug (antihistamine), dose:IC50 almost equal to 301 nM

http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_752.name: Ikarugamycin
http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_752.definition: Natural product (antibiotic from Streptomyces phaeochromogenes), dose: IC50 almost equal to 2.7 µM (in H1299 cells)

http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_132.name: Dynasore
http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_132.definition: Small molecule inhibitor of dynamin GTPase, dose: IC50 almost equal to 15 µM for dynamin 1

http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_194.name: Dyngo 4a
http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_194.definition: Improved dynamin inhibitor (derivative of Dynasore), dose: Sub-micromolar to micromolar (varies by cell type)

http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_364.name: Chlorpromazine
http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_364.definition: Antipsychotic (phenothiazine parent); inhibits clathrin coat assembly, dose: Varies; typically used at 10-20 µM

http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_520.name: Monodansylcadaverine (MDC)
http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_520.definition: Small molecule; inhibits transglutaminase-dependent steps of CME, dose: Typically 100 µM

http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_752.name: Phenylarsine oxide (PAO)
http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_752.definition: Arsenical compound; disrupts receptor clustering, dose: Low micromolar (varies by cell type)

http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_495.name: Methyl-beta-cyclodextrin (MβCD)
http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_495.definition: Cholesterol-depleting agent, dose: Commonly used at 1-10 mM for 30-60 minutes

http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_473.name: Nystatin
http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_473.definition: Polyene antifungal agent that binds cholesterol, dose: Typically 25-50 µg/mL for 30-60 minutes

http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_832.name: Filipin
http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_832.definition: Polyene macrolide antibiotic, dose: Used at 1-5 µg/mL; binds membrane cholesterol

http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_280.name: Genistein
http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_280.definition: Tyrosine kinase inhibitor (plant-derived isoflavone), dose: 50-200 µM; inhibits Src-family kinases and internalization

http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_642.name: 7-ketocholesterol
http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_642.definition: Sterol derivative (membrane lipid packing disruptor), dose:Effective at 10-20 µM

http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_133.name: Methyl-beta-cyclodextrin
http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_133.definition: Cholesterol-depleting agent, dose:Typically 1-10 mM for 30 min

http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_766.name: Nystatin
http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_766.definition: Polyene antifungal (binds membrane cholesterol), dose:Typically 25-50 µg/mL

http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_910.name: CHIR-99021
http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_910.definition: GSK3β inhibitor, dose:IC50 almost equal to 6.7 nM

http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_860.name: Roscovitine (Seliciclib)
http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_860.definition: CDK5 inhibitor, dose:IC50 almost equal to 0.65 µM (CDK5)

http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_232.name: Mdivi-1
http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_232.definition: Dynamin-related GTPase inhibitor (Drp1 selective, off-targets dynamin), dose:50 µM

http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_783.name: PP2
http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_783.definition: Src-family kinase inhibitor, dose:IC50 almost equal to 4-5 µM

http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_137.name: C3 Transferase
http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_137.definition: Bacterial toxin, dose:1-to-10 µg/mL commonly used in vitro

http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_753.name: Y-27632
http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_753.definition: Small molecule ROCK inhibitor, dose:IC50 almost equal to 140 nM for ROCK1

http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_438.name: Fasudil (HA-1077)
http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_438.definition: Drug (ROCK inhibitor used clinically), dose:IC50 almost equal to 330 nM for ROCK2

http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_137.name: Rhosin
http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_137.definition: Small molecule RhoA-GEF interaction inhibitor, dose:IC50 almost equal to 5.2 µM for RhoA activation

http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_144.name: NSC23766
http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_144.definition: Small molecule Rac1 inhibitor (indirectly affects RhoA via cross-regulation), dose:IC50 almost equal to 50 µM for Rac1-GEF binding

http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_136.name: EIPA (ethylisopropylamiloride)
http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_136.definition: Ion transport inhibitor / Na⁺/H⁺ exchanger blocker, dose:Commonly used ~50 µM in cell assays

http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_132.name: NAV-2729
http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CHEBI_132.definition: Small molecule (ARF regulatory protein inhibitor), dose:Inhibition in µM range (complex target profile including ARF regulators)
